subcodes.first_line: O My friend in the Scriptures and My name in the Books! Hearken thou unto the Call of God from the shore of the Ancient Sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا خلیلی فی الصحف و اسمی فی الکتب ان استمع ندآء الله من شاطی بحر القدم فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
